title: Perfectly Optimized
description: The Most Optimization-Based Modpack. Combines Simply Optimized with additional mods to ensure that your FPS skyrockets.
body:
# The Most Optimization-Based Modpack
A Minecraft modpack designed for peak performance and enhanced gameplay, featuring a carefully curated selection of Quality of Life (QoL) mods to streamline and optimize the Minecraft experience.

Jump back into Minecraft and enjoy a smooth gaming experience with over 200 FPS!


![image info](https://i.ibb.co/DLJtBNT/Copy-of-Copy-of-Amzyrahc-1.png)

<details closed>
<summary>Featured Mods</summary>


* Async Pack Scan
* Chunky
* Dynamic FPS
* EntityCulling
* Exordium
* FastChest
* ImmediatelyFast
* Indium
* Lithium
* Log Cleaner
* Methane
* Mod Menu
* ModernFix
* More Culling
* No Chat Reports
* Server Pinger Fixer
* Sodium
* Tape Stop
* ThreadTweak
* Tweaks for Audio Engine
* Very Many Players
* Video Tape
* Reese's Sodium Options
* Sodium Extra


</details>
